name: @moneyworks/api
description: REST API server for MoneyWorks built with ElysiaJS and Bun
overview: This package provides a modern REST API server for MoneyWorks accounting software. Built with ElysiaJS for performance and type safety, it offers multiple export formats, caching, MWScript evaluation, and comprehensive Swagger documentation.

exports.name: Application Factory
exports.description: Main functions for creating and configuring the API server

items.name: createApp
items.description: Creates and configures an Elysia application instance with all routes and middleware. Returns a configured app ready to listen.

items.name: startServer
items.description: Starts the API server with configuration from environment variables. This is the main entry point used by the package.

exports.name: Routes
exports.description: API route handlers and endpoint definitions

items.name: tableRoutes
items.description: Registers all table-related endpoints including list, export, schema, and labels. Handles multiple export formats and query parameters.

items.name: evalRoutes
items.description: Registers MWScript evaluation endpoints for executing expressions and templates.

items.name: companyRoutes
items.description: Registers company information endpoints.

items.name: i18nRoutes
items.description: Registers internationalization endpoints for languages and translations.

exports.name: Controllers
exports.description: Business logic controllers for handling API operations

items.name: BaseTableController
items.description: Abstract base controller providing common functionality for all table controllers. Handles export formats, pagination, and schema operations.

items.name: TaxRateController
items.description: Controller for TaxRate table operations. Fully implemented and tested controller serving as reference implementation.

items.name: requestIdMiddleware
items.description: Adds unique request IDs to all requests for tracking and debugging. IDs are included in responses and error messages.

items.name: errorHandler
items.description: Global error handler providing consistent error responses with proper status codes and error details.

items.name: loggingMiddleware
items.description: Request/response logging middleware with configurable log levels and formats.

items.name: i18nMiddleware
items.description: Detects user language from Accept-Language header or lang query parameter. Makes language available in request context.

exports.name: Services
exports.description: Shared services for caching, data access, and utilities

items.name: CacheService
items.description: In-memory caching service with TTL support. Used for caching company info, field labels, and MWScript results.

items.name: MoneyWorksService
items.description: Service wrapper around SmartMoneyWorksClient providing high-level operations and error handling.

items.name: ValidationService
items.description: Validates requests against schemas and MoneyWorks business rules.

items.name: AppConfig
items.description: Complete configuration interface for the API application.

items.name: TableQueryParams
items.description: Query parameters for table export endpoints.

items.name: ApiResponse
items.description: Standard API response wrapper supporting both success and error cases.

items.name: ExportResult
items.description: Result of a table export operation including data and metadata.

items.name: TableSchema
items.description: Schema definition for a MoneyWorks table.

items.name: loadConfig
items.description: Loads configuration from environment variables with defaults.

items.name: AVAILABLE_TABLES
items.description: Registry of available tables with their controllers and status.

items.name: API_VERSION
items.description: Current API version used in URL paths.

items.name: formatResponse
items.signature: (data: any, format: ExportFormat, contentType: string): any
items.description: Formats response data based on requested format and content type.

items.name: parseAcceptLanguage
items.description: Parses Accept-Language header to extract language preferences.
items.example:
const languages = parseAcceptLanguage('en-US,en;q=0.9,fr;q=0.8');
// Returns: ['en-US', 'en', 'fr']

items.name: generateRequestId
items.description: Generates unique request ID for tracking.
items.example:
const requestId = generateRequestId();
// Returns: 'req_1a2b3c4d5e6f'

examples.title: Basic API Setup
examples.description: Complete example of setting up and running the API

examples.title: Client Integration
examples.description: Using the API from a client application

examples.title: Custom Table Controller
examples.description: Adding support for a new MoneyWorks table

examples.title: Middleware Extension
examples.description: Adding custom middleware for authentication or logging

examples.title: Caching Strategy
examples.description: Implementing efficient caching for improved performance

designPrinciples.description: The API follows REST conventions with proper HTTP methods, status codes, and resource-oriented URLs. Versioning ensures backward compatibility.
Built with TypeScript and ElysiaJS's type system, providing compile-time safety and runtime validation for all endpoints.
Tables are added incrementally as they're vetted, allowing the API to grow safely while maintaining quality.
Built on Bun runtime with ElysiaJS for exceptional performance. Includes caching, efficient formats, and optimized queries.
Comprehensive Swagger documentation, consistent error handling, and multiple export formats make integration straightforward.

futurePlans.description: JWT-based authentication with role-based access control
Real-time updates for data changes using WebSockets
GraphQL endpoint as alternative to REST
Request rate limiting with configurable tiers
